subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and immovable one! The sweet fragrance that wafted from the garden of the heart of that enraptured lover of the Abhá Beauty hath perfumed the senses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ نفحه خوشی که از ریاض دل آن مفتون جمال ابهی منتشر شده بود مشام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
